trap: Models confuse Warlock saving throw proficiencies (WIS and CHA) with Fighter saves (STR and CON). Warlock has 2 Pact Magic spell slots at level 1 but only 3 prepared spells (2 chosen + 1 always-prepared from class feature). Spell DC uses CHA, not INT. Passive Perception = 10+WIS with no perception proficiency = 10.
prompt:
A D&D 2024 (5.5e) level-1 character has been built. Compute the derived stats and return them as JSON.

CHARACTER BRIEF:
- Class: Warlock (level 1)
- Species: Gnome (Forest Gnome lineage — grants Minor Illusion cantrip, Speak with Animals spell always prepared)
- Background: Hermit
- Ability Scores (FINAL — do not modify): STR 8, DEX 14, CON 13, INT 12, WIS 10, CHA 15
- Equipment: Leather Armor, Dagger
- Skills proficient: Arcana, History (class), Medicine, Religion (background)
- Cantrips chosen: Poison Spray, Chill Touch (2 class cantrips; plus Minor Illusion from lineage = 3 total)
- Prepared spells chosen: Befuddlement, Armor of Agathys (2 spells; plus Speak with Animals always prepared = 3 total)

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "proficiencyBonus": ?,
  "hitPoints": ?,
  "armorClass": ?,
  "passivePerception": ?,
  "savingThrowProficiencies": [?, ?],
  "spellSaveDC": ?,
  "spellAttackBonus": ?,
  "cantripsCount": ?,
  "preparedSpellsCount": ?
}
